name: Color of the Supreme King Haki

issues.description: Rest action missing condition: 'you may rest 1 of your DON!! cards' is conditional. The subsequent power reduction effects should only trigger if rest action is performed. Current DSL does not reflect this conditional chain.

Target scope incorrect: 'Up to 1 of your Characters or [Silvers Rayleigh]' should target own Characters only. [Silvers Rayleigh] is a specific character name, not a leader. Should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' with optional name filter for Silvers Rayleigh.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct but text says 'during this turn' which is functionally equivalent. However, the context suggests these effects are conditional on the Rest action succeeding.
